items.title: Reaffirming our commitment to child safety in the face of European Union inaction

items.title: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
items.content: Gemma 4: our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.
items.contentSnippet: Gemma 4: our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.
items.summary: Gemma 4是迄今最智能的开源模型，专为高级推理和代理工作流程设计。该模型在性能和功能上达到新高度，为用户提供强大的开放模型解决方案。

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.content: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.contentSnippet:
Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority,
to balance cost and latency.

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.content: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.contentSnippet: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.summary: Google Vids将推出新AI功能，由Lyria 3和Veo 3.1支持，包括免费生成高质量视频等。新功能将提升视频创作、编辑和分享体验，无需付费即可使用。

items.title: Here’s how to watch Coachella on YouTube.
items.content: Watch Coachella 2026 live on YouTube starting April 10. Stream stages in 4K, shop exclusive merch and join global watch parties.
items.contentSnippet: Watch Coachella 2026 live on YouTube starting April 10. Stream stages in 4K, shop exclusive merch and join global watch parties.
items.summary: Coachella 2026 将于4月10日起在 YouTube 进行直播。观众可享受4K超高清画质，购买独家周边商品，并参与全球同步观看派对。

items.title: Give your laptop a new life with ChromeOS Flex
items.content: Google and Back Market's new USB kit makes it easy to install ChromeOS Flex, a free OS to revive your PC or Mac and reduce e-waste.
items.contentSnippet: Google and Back Market's new USB kit makes it easy to install ChromeOS Flex, a free OS to revive your PC or Mac and reduce e-waste.

name: Ted Briggs
title: Platforms & Devices Lead for Sustainability Strategic Partnerships

items.summary: 谷歌与Back Market合作推出USB工具包，简化ChromeOS Flex安装。ChromeOS Flex是一款免费操作系统，可让PC或Mac焕发新生，同时减少电子垃圾。

items.title: Google.org and Highlights for Children have helped 1 million students navigate the digital world.
items.content: Google.org expanded our existing collaboration with Highlights for Children.
items.contentSnippet: Google.org expanded our existing collaboration with Highlights for Children.

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.content: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.contentSnippet: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.summary: 谷歌与巴西政府合作，共同开发了一款卫星影像地图，旨在帮助保护巴西森林。该地图将利用卫星数据监测森林状况，为巴西提供更有效的森林保护工具。

items.title: New personal health coach features are coming to Fitbit.
items.content: Fitbit adds cycle, mental wellbeing & nutrition tools in Public Preview. Now available for those without a Premium membership.
items.contentSnippet: Fitbit adds cycle, mental wellbeing & nutrition tools in Public Preview. Now available for those without a Premium membership.
items.summary: Fitbit推出新的个人健康教练功能，包括骑行、心理健康和营养工具，现已进入公共预览阶段，并免费提供给非高级会员使用。

items.title: Google’s ‘AI Works for Britain’ aims to help stuck Brits unlock progression
items.content: Google launches AI Works for Britain upskilling initiative to help the public move from basic prompts to progression-boosting applications of AI.
items.contentSnippet: Google launches AI Works for Britain upskilling initiative to help the public move from basic prompts to progression-boosting applications of AI.
items.summary: 谷歌推出“AI Works for Britain”技能提升计划，旨在帮助英国公众从基础AI提示转向能促进职业发展的AI应用。该计划旨在提升民众对AI技术的掌握和应用能力，助力其职业发展。

items.title: Explore Benjamin Franklin’s scientific discoveries on NotebookLM
items.content: Benjamin Franklin’s scientific legacy and diplomatic career as seen through original Royal Society documents.
items.contentSnippet: Benjamin Franklin’s scientific legacy and diplomatic career as seen through original Royal Society documents.

name: Sir Mark Walport
title: Foreign Secretary and Vice President of the Royal Society

items.summary: 本文通过皇家学会的原始文件，探讨了本杰明·富兰克林的科学遗产和外交生涯。

items.title: Google Maps simplifies battery predictions and trip planning for 350+ Android Auto EV models.
items.content: We’re bringing Maps’ AI-powered EV charging features to over 350 car models with Android Auto. Now, Maps will recommend when and where to charge based on your EV model a…
items.contentSnippet: We’re bringing Maps’ AI-powered EV charging features to over 350 car models with Android Auto. Now, Maps will recommend when and where to charge based on your EV model a…
items.summary: 谷歌地图将AI驱动的电动汽车充电功能扩展至350多款搭载Android Auto的车型。该功能根据用户车辆型号，智能推荐充电时机和地点，简化电池预测与行程规划，提升电动汽车使用体验。
